findings: Backward bulk-related features with near-constant values exhibit high local label conflicts, indicating saturation or measurement limits rather than meaningful class variation.
Local evidence preserves the tension between low cardinality features and other features with strong class-conditioned variation.
No local consistency patterns verified for these low cardinality features, supporting the saturation/measurement limit interpretation.
limitations: Analysis limited to backward bulk features; forward bulk and other features not locally verified in this task.
